code:
proof fn phi_3_create_key_namespace_disagrees_with_obj(req: CreateRequest)
    requires

name: unmarshal_ignores_state_validation
code:
proof fn phi_4_unmarshal_ignores_state_validation(obj: DynamicObjectView)
    requires
        obj.kind == PodView::kind(),
        PodView::unmarshal_spec(obj.spec) is Ok,
        PodView::unmarshal_status(obj.status) is Ok,
    ensures
        PodView::unmarshal(obj) is Ok,
{
}
reason: unmarshal succeeds whenever kind/spec/status parse correctly but never checks state_validation — invalid objects (e.g. pods with spec == None) can be successfully unmarshalled

name: object_ref_ignores_uid
code:
proof fn phi_5_object_ref_ignores_uid(p1: PodView, p2: PodView)
    requires
        p1.metadata.name == p2.metadata.name,
        p1.metadata.namespace == p2.metadata.namespace,
        p1.metadata.uid != p2.metadata.uid,
        p1.metadata.name is Some,
        p1.metadata.namespace is Some,
    ensures
        p1.object_ref() == p2.object_ref(),
{
}
reason: object_ref is (kind, name, namespace) without uid — two distinct resource incarnations with different uids produce identical ObjectRefs, conflating identity across deletions and recreations
